sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT rowNumberInBlock() AS row_num, value FROM test_table SETTINGS max_block_size = 2;
UPDATE test_table SET value = 'updated' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT rowNumberInBlock() AS row_num, id FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table) SETTINGS max_block_size = 1;
